data.summary: Exploratory evidence is insufficient to assert a hard requirement failure.
data.assessment: The exploratory step aimed to validate the requirement of 'Slot allocation based on favorability', but the evidence provided does not confirm that the system effectively allocates slots based on the favorability scores of stylists. While the linked use case describes a favorability scoring system, it does not demonstrate how these scores are utilized in the actual slot allocation process. This indicates a gap in the requirement coverage, as the necessary implementation details are missing.
gaps: No evidence of how favorability scores are used to allocate slots in the booking system.

deterministicFollowUps.title: Define slot allocation logic based on favorability scores
deterministicFollowUps.assertion: Verify that slots are allocated based on the favorability scores of stylists.
